action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a pillow, a book, a potion recipe, a bed and a wardrobe. The pillow is on the floor. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The wardrobe is closed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Floorboard potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, eye of newt, peach, spider egg.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Add the peach into your cauldron.
3. Wiggle a zulpowand over your cauldron.
4. Use a fairy wand over your cauldron.
5. Add the eye of newt into your cauldron.
6. Put the spider egg into your cauldron.
action.label: context
